description_long: This object is a rifle, but it appears as a perfectly flat, rectangular, featureless slab with no discernible details, contours, or components typically associated with firearms. The surface is uniformly colored in a medium gray tone, lacking any visible markings, textures, or attachments. There are no visible elements such as a stock, barrel, trigger, magazine, or sight, making it impossible to identify any specific model or type. The object is extremely thin, almost like a flat sheet, and does not display any three-dimensional relief or depth. Its overall appearance is highly abstract and minimalistic, resembling a flat panel more than a functional weapon. The lack of any recognizable rifle features suggests this may be a placeholder or a highly stylized representation.
description: A flat, featureless, medium-gray rectangular slab with no visible rifle details or components. The object is extremely minimalistic and abstract.
description_view_0: A flat, gray rectangle with no visible features or rifle components.
description_view_1: Identical flat, gray surface; no distinguishing marks or rifle parts visible.
description_view_2: Featureless, medium-gray rectangle; no rifle details apparent.
description_view_3: Flat, uniform gray surface; no visible rifle characteristics.
